title: China’s AI Boom Is Reshaping Workplaces as Firms Cut Hiring and Quietly Trim Jobs
description: As Chinese companies race to adopt artificial intelligence tools, a quieter transformation is unfolding inside offices and boardrooms. Hiring is slowing, some jobs are disappearing, and businesses are increasingly prioritizing efficiency over workforce expansion, raising questions about how China will balance its AI ambitions with employment stability.
